mapper.sql: id , task_name, task_type, status, total_count, processed_count, start_time, finish_time, cost_time, error_msg,create_by, update_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO hotel_import_task ( id, task_name, task_type, status, total_count, processed_count, start_time, finish_time, cost_time, create_by, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.taskName}, #{item.taskType}, #{item.status}, #{item.totalCount}, #{item.processedCount}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.finishTime}, #{item.costTime}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.updateTime} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM hotel_import_task ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM hotel_import_task WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM hotel_import_task WHERE create_by = #{createBy} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE hotel_import_task SET status = #{status}, start_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE hotel_import_task SET status = #{status}, finish_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW(), cost_time = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW()) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE hotel_import_task SET status = #{status}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, finish_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW(), cost_time = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW()) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE hotel_import_task SET processed_count = processed_count + #{increment}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{taskId}
UPDATE hotel_import_task SET total_count = #{totalCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM hotel_import_task WHERE status IN (0, 1) ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT
FROM hotel_import_task ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
